themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents capable of autonomous actions and decision-making within research contexts, including their development, capabilities, and implications.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focusing on AI tools that aid developers in writing, reviewing, and debugging code, enhancing productivity and efficiency in software development.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles detailing specific AI-powered tools and platforms designed to assist researchers in various stages of the research process.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discussions around the creation and detection of AI-generated or simulated users, including their implications for research and security.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content related to AI technologies that condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries, aiding in information digestion.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI's capability to analyze and interpret user sentiment from various feedback sources, such as reviews and social media.

themes.name: AI design research
themes.description: Explores how AI is being used to inform, augment, or automate aspects of the design research process, from ideation to validation.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Content that examines the application of AI in streamlining, automating, or enhancing the process of testing product usability.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI's role in analyzing job markets, assessing candidate suitability, and understanding the impact of AI on employment.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Focuses on the research, development, and implications of AI-powered chatbots, including their use in conversations and information retrieval.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
